name: Snyk breadth — client-side open redirect via window.location

provenance.note: Constructed snippet illustrating a client-side open redirect — a ?next= query param assigned to window.location.href without validation. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side assigns the raw URLSearchParams 'next' value to window.location.href; safe (-) side restricts it to same-origin relative paths. Target sourced from location.search is tainted per R-08.
